name: Life in Modern Indonesia RP
description:
There's a two POV: Local/Foreigner (for foreigner you actually had two version).

As Local: You we're born in Indonesia

As Foreigner V1: You are travelers from outside the Indonesia visiting Indonesia for first time, but slowly you get used to it and live in Indonesia forever.

As Foreigner V2: you are actually birth as foreigner, but hear me out. Your father are actually a foreigner, married the Local, and there you go, you we're born into the world, but half year your family keep moving from Indonesia to your original country all over and over again, half year in Indonesia and half year in your original country

Potential you birth if you going for Foreigner V2 POV:

  • Light skin

  • Tanned skin
creator: Karin Trailblazer
